variants.title: HiFi Filter SAIN 01AF013701 Clogging Indicator
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAIN 01AF013701 Clogging Indicator. Easy to install and replace, the SAIN 01AF013701 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: CLOGGING INDICATOR, Dimension 1 (D1): 30.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 27.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 1/8"-NPTF, Height 1 (H1): 38.5 mm, Height 2 (H2): 21.0 mm
